name: The Sound Reef
subtitle: Where Frequencies Become Landscapes
desc: A living reef sculpted by sound itself. Each instrument is a coral formation, each melody a current. The weather here changes with the music you play — a rainy day for sad songs, sunlight breaking through for triumphant chords. This is where listening becomes topography.
note: 内容按三大类展示：视频（video）、照片（image）、文档（pdf/doc/txt）
